ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., article, conference paper, book chapter) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was issued */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal or conference name */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., draft, submitted, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID (ORCID) of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_publications" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., primary author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_types" (
  "citation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation type */,
  "citation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the citation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citation type */,
  "citation_value" TEXT /* Value of the citation (e.g., DOI number, PubMed ID) */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date the citation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("citation_type_id") REFERENCES citation_types ("citation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the researcher belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID (ORCID) of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the ranking (e.g., impact factor, citation count) */,
  "rank_value" REAL /* Value of the ranking */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_ranks_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., draft, submitted, published) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "collaboration_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the collaboration (e.g., lead researcher, team member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_collaborations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Name of the funding source (e.g., grant, sponsor) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_funding_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., views, downloads, citations) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_awards_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
column_names: Type of publication (e.g., article, conference paper, book chapter)
Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication
Status of the publication (e.g., draft, submitted, published)
Open Researcher and Contributor ID (ORCID) of the author

Role of the author (e.g., primary author, co-author)
Unique identifier for each citation type
Value of the citation (e.g., DOI number, PubMed ID)
ID of the department the researcher belongs to
Open Researcher and Contributor ID (ORCID) of the researcher
Name of the ranking (e.g., impact factor, citation count)

Name of the role (e.g., researcher, administrator)
